name: Cronometro
js:
AppManager.register('stopwatch',{init:function(b,win){b.innerHTML='
Cronometro
00:00.00
';b.className='p-16 flex-col';var d=TK.byId('sw-display'),run=false,t0=0,el=0,timer=null;function fmt(ms){var m=Math.floor(ms/60000);var s=Math.floor((ms%60000)/1000);var c=Math.floor((ms%1000)/10);return String(m).padStart(2,'0')+':'+String(s).padStart(2,'0')+'.'+String(c).padStart(2,'0')}function tick(){el=Date.now()-t0;d.textContent=fmt(el)}TK.byId('sw-start').onclick=function(){if(run){clearInterval(timer);run=false;this.textContent='Continuar'}else{t0=Date.now()-el;timer=setInterval(tick,10);run=true;this.textContent='Pausar'}};TK.byId('sw-reset').onclick=function(){clearInterval(timer);run=false;el=0;d.textContent='00:00.00';TK.byId('sw-start').textContent='Iniciar'}}})
